Curius follower graph

Each dot is a Curius user. A line points from the person who follows to the person being followed. The map uses every stored follow edge. High-core and high-degree people sit near the center; small or isolated weak components sit around the outside.

Drag to pan. Scroll to zoom. Click a dot, or search by name, handle, or school.
